content: troubleshoot this expression If(AnnualSalary == "", "N/A", If(Value(AnnualSalary) <= 60000, "Entry Level", If(Value(AnnualSalary)  100000, "Mid Level", "Senior Level")))

Thanks for providing the expression! I see you're trying to categorize employees into different levels based on their annual salary.

The system stores column names like AnnualSalary as text by default. To do math with them, we need to wrap them in Value() so the system knows to treat them as numbers. Without it, the comparisons will not work correctly. Also, the second `If` statement is missing the `value` wrapper for `AnnualSalary`.

Here's the corrected expression:

```
If(AnnualSalary == "", "N/A", If(Value(AnnualSalary) <= 60000, "Entry Level", If(Value(AnnualSalary) <= 100000, "Mid Level", "Senior Level")))
```

{{SUGGESTED_ACTIONS:Revise this expression|Create new column|Test with my data|Explain this expression}}
